privileged_info_summary: The task involves importing school data into CAMEO Data Manager running on Windows. Of the 5 schools listed: Horizon Science Academy exists but at a different address (5401 S Western Ave, not 2400 W 18th St), Bronzeville Classical is correctly addressed (8 W Root St, Chicago 60609), Englewood STEM exists (6835 S Normal Blvd, Chicago 60621), and Back of the Yards exists as a College Preparatory High School (2111 W 47th St, Chicago 60609). However, 'Sola Wyndotte' does not exist as a school in Chicago or Illinois. The CSV source file and required PowerShell setup scripts do not exist in the task directory, indicating the data is synthetic. The task requires correct CSV field mapping (FAC_NAME→Name, ADDR_1→Street Address, MUNI→City, ST→State, ZIP_5→Zip Code).
